analysis_templates.ac:
VVINP VINP VSS DC {VINCM} AC 0.5
VVINN VINN VSS DC {VINCM} AC -0.5
.ac dec 80 1k 50G
.end
analysis_templates.tran:
VVINP VINP VSS PULSE({VINCM - VIN_STEP/4} {VINCM + VIN_STEP/4} 2n {TRISE} {TFALL} {TWIDTH} {TPER})
VVINN VINN VSS PULSE({VINCM + VIN_STEP/4} {VINCM - VIN_STEP/4} 2n {TRISE} {TFALL} {TWIDTH} {TPER})
.tran 0 {TSTOP} 0 {TSTEP}
.end
